subtasks.description: Extract contract renewal dates, vendor names, and license IDs from SAM system documents. Return structured contract data with renewal date, status, and vendor information.
Query consumption trends from the license management database. Calculate average monthly usage, trend direction, and utilization rates for the past 12 months grouped by license/vendor.

Reconcile SAM contract data with consumption trends. Assess renewal risk by comparing renewal dates to consumption patterns, identify high-risk renewals (imminent dates with high/critical consumption), and generate risk classification and notification recommendations for procurement team.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks (minimum necessary): (1) extract_sam_contracts (small tier) — straightforward document field extraction from SAM contracts, no complex logic required; (2) query_consumption (mid tier) — multi-month aggregation with trends requires JOIN and window function logic; (3) reconcile_and_assess (mid tier) — combines two sources (extracted contracts + SQL consumption data) to classify risk and recommend actions, which is core cross_recon work including risk posture decision logic. No policy_action is needed because risk assessment and renewal recommendations are analytical outputs of reconciliation, not governance policy checks. No multitool_plan is added because the workflow uses only standard extract→query→reconcile agents, not the 25-tool enterprise registry.

output.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date)::DATE AS month, cf.license_id, cf.publisher, AVG(cf.amount_usd) AS avg_monthly_usage, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) AS avg_active_seats, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.event_id) AS event_count, CASE WHEN LAG(AVG(cf.amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.license_id ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date)) IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN AVG(cf.amount_usd) > LAG(AVG(cf.amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.license_id ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date)) THEN 1 ELSE -1 END AS trend_direction, ROUND(100.0 * AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) / NULLIF(MAX(cf.daily_active_seats) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.license_id), 0), 2) AS utilization_rate_pct FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date), cf.license_id, cf.publisher ORDER BY cf.license_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date) DESC

sam_contracts.message: extract_sam_contracts returned null values for all contract fields

consumption_data.message: query_consumption SQL query defined but no result set provided

required_inputs: MongoDB/SAM contract records with renewal_date and license_id
SQL consumption facts result set with license_id and utilization metrics
next_steps: Execute extract_sam_contracts query against SAM system
Execute query_consumption SQL against consumption_facts table

Reconciliation will then classify licenses as: high_risk (imminent renewal + critical consumption), medium_risk (near renewal + elevated consumption), low_risk (distant renewal or declining consumption), no_recent_activity (null consumption data)
